description_long: This is a large, amphora-shaped vase with a wide mouth, two robust handles, and a rounded body tapering to a narrow base. The surface is adorned with intricate black-figure artwork depicting mythological scenes, including warriors, animals, and ornamental motifs. The upper neck features a band of stylized floral patterns, while the main body is encircled by narrative friezes. The handles are thick and arching, attached at the shoulder and neck, and the rim is slightly flared with visible wear and chipping. The color palette consists of natural terracotta with black painted figures and decorative borders. The vase shows signs of age, including visible cracks and surface wear, suggesting historical significance and delicate preservation.
description: A large, amphora-style vase with black-figure mythological scenes and floral motifs on a terracotta background, featuring two sturdy handles and a flared rim. The surface shows visible cracks and signs of age.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main mythological scene with warriors and a shield, as well as the detailed floral band around the neck.
description_view_1: Side view highlights one of the thick handles and the ornamental motifs, with less focus on the narrative scene.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a different mythological scene with three standing figures and the second handle, along with the floral neck band.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the other handle and ornamental motifs, with a partial view of the narrative artwork.
attribute_pattern: black-figure narrative scenes and floral motifs
